preamble: Prothesis of the labio-velar approximant [w] is a common hiatus-breaking or word-initial strengthening process.

examples.note: Historical prothesis of [w] in the development of Modern English.
Insertion of a glide to prevent vowel clashes.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
